heading: Interest compounded daily
label: 6622 Interest compounded daily
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 97–248, title III, § 344(c)96 Stat. 636Sept. 3, 1982“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall apply to interest accruing after .”section 6601 of this titleDecember 31, 1982
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 97–248, title III, § 344(c)96 Stat. 636Sept. 3, 1982“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall apply to interest accruing after .”section 6601 of this titleDecember 31, 1982

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: In computing the amount of any interest required to be paid under this title or sections 1961(c)(1) or 2411 of title 28, United States Code, by the Secretary or by the taxpayer, or any other amount determined by reference to such amount of interest, such interest and such amount shall be compounded daily.

children.heading: Exception for penalty for failure to file estimated tax
children.label: b Exception for penalty for failure to file estimated tax
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply for purposes of computing the amount of any addition to tax under section 6654 or 6655.
